text: Being here, I feel a quiet thrill of curiosity. The clean, intentional lines of the architecture and the electric colors of the R+D display fill me with a sense of potential. What knowledge waits, just beyond this pane of glass? Each exhibit whispers of human ingenuity and our relentless drive to question and create. I feel a gentle anticipation, as if I am about to engage in a silent dialogue with the minds encapsulated within these walls.
